title: Tange Sazen: Hien iaigiri
actors: Kinnosuke Nakamura, Tetsurô Tanba, Keiko Awaji
plot: Loyal samurai Samanosuke is attacked, mutilated, and left for dead while carrying out a mission for his clan. He recovers but has lost an eye and an arm. Taking a new identity as Tange Sazen, he searches for a stolen urn which has...
